entity.summary: Permissionless NFT automated-market-maker exchange infrastructure with factory-deployed NFTAMM vaults across Ethereum, Base, and ApeChain.
entity.notes: Current open-source volume adapter code documents Clutch Anvil factory deployments and hourly on-chain swap-volume collection across Ethereum, Base, and ApeChain, with 2026 deployment start points. HEI models the AMM exchange layer as one multichain entity rather than separate markets or NFT collections.

evidence.title: Clutch Anvil AMM DEX volume adapter
evidence.notes: Current adapter documents permissionless NFT AMM vaults, market creation, NFT buy/sell swap events, fee handling, hourly pulls, and 2026 deployments across Ethereum, Base, and ApeChain.

evidence.title: Clutch Anvil AMM protocol profile
evidence.notes: Protocol-profile reference preserves the Clutch Anvil AMM identity and exchange classification.

evidence.title: Clutch Anvil AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus provides the exchange discovery surface used alongside the protocol-specific on-chain adapter.
